annotations.label: Frame bundle

anchor.snippet: a frame bundle is a principal fiber

annotations.note: Mathlib has no principal bundles or frame bundles; grep for `PrincipalBundle`/`FrameBundle` returns nothing.

annotations.label: Tangent frame bundle (lead)

anchor.snippet: The frame bundle of a smooth manifold is the one associated with its tangent bundle

annotations.note: Mathlib has the tangent bundle (`Mathlib/Geometry/Manifold/VectorBundle/Tangent.lean`) as a vector bundle but no associated frame bundle construction.

annotations.label: Frame at a point

anchor.snippet: A frame at a point

annotations.note: No `Frame`/`FrameAt` notion of an ordered basis of a fiber appears in Mathlib's bundle library.

annotations.label: Right action of GL on frames

anchor.snippet: has a natural right action by the general linear group

annotations.note: The GL action on frames is not formalized since frames themselves are absent from Mathlib.

annotations.label: GL action is free and transitive

anchor.snippet: is both free and transitive

annotations.note: Without a `Frame` type, free/transitive GL action on frames is not stated.

annotations.label: Frame bundle as disjoint union

anchor.snippet: is the disjoint union of all the

annotations.note: No frame bundle total space exists in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Principal bundle structure on F(E)

anchor.snippet: becomes a principal fiber bundle over

annotations.note: Mathlib has `FiberBundle` (`Mathlib/Topology/FiberBundle/Basic.lean`) but no principal bundle structure.

annotations.label: Transition functions agree

anchor.snippet: One can check that the transition functions

annotations.note: Comparison of transition cocycles between a vector bundle and its frame bundle is absent.

annotations.label: Smooth frame bundle

anchor.snippet: The above all works in the smooth category as well

annotations.note: No smooth principal frame bundle construction exists in `Mathlib/Geometry/Manifold`.

annotations.label: Vector bundle and frame bundle are associated

anchor.snippet: are associated bundles

annotations.note: Grep for `AssociatedBundle` returns nothing in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Associated vector bundle from representation

anchor.snippet: Given any linear representation

annotations.note: The associated bundle construction `P ×_G V` is not present.

annotations.label: E isomorphic to associated bundle of defining rep

anchor.snippet: is naturally isomorphic to the bundle

annotations.note: No statement of `E ≅ F(E) ×_GL ℝⁿ` exists without principal/associated bundles.

annotations.label: Dual bundle via dual representation

anchor.snippet: the dual bundle of

annotations.note: Mathlib has no dual-bundle-as-associated-bundle construction since the associated-bundle infrastructure is missing.

annotations.label: Tangent frame bundle of a manifold

anchor.snippet: is the frame bundle associated with the tangent bundle

annotations.note: Tangent bundle exists but its frame bundle does not.

annotations.label: Smooth frame

anchor.snippet: Local sections of the frame bundle

annotations.note: No notion of a local section of a frame bundle since frame bundles aren't defined.

annotations.label: Cross-section theorem for principal bundles

anchor.snippet: The cross-section theorem for principal bundles states

annotations.note: Principal bundles are not in Mathlib so the cross-section theorem (triviality ↔ global section) is not stated.

annotations.label: Parallelizable iff global frame

anchor.snippet: a manifold is parallelizable if and only if

annotations.note: Grep for `Parallelizable` returns nothing in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Coordinate vector fields as smooth frame

anchor.snippet: the coordinate vector fields

annotations.note: Mathlib lacks the language of local frames in which to phrase this example.

annotations.label: Solder form

anchor.snippet: called the solder form

annotations.note: Grep for `solder` returns nothing in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Solder form is horizontal and equivariant

anchor.snippet: The solder form is horizontal in the sense

annotations.note: No solder form, hence no statement of its horizontality/equivariance.

annotations.label: Basic/tensorial form

anchor.snippet: A form with these properties is called a basic or tensorial form

annotations.note: Basic/tensorial forms on principal bundles are not formalized.

annotations.label: Orthonormal frame

anchor.snippet: An orthonormal frame for

annotations.note: Mathlib has `OrthonormalBasis` of an inner product space but no fiberwise orthonormal frame on a Riemannian bundle.

annotations.label: O(k) acts freely and transitively on orthonormal frames

anchor.snippet: acts freely and transitively on the set of all orthonormal frames

annotations.note: The free/transitive O(k) action on orthonormal frames is not stated in this form.

annotations.label: Orthonormal frame bundle

anchor.snippet: is the set of all orthonormal frames at each point

annotations.note: No orthonormal frame bundle is constructed in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Oriented orthonormal frame bundle

anchor.snippet: then one can define the oriented orthonormal frame bundle

annotations.note: Mathlib has `Orientation` but no oriented orthonormal frame bundle construction.

annotations.label: Orthonormal frame bundle of a Riemannian manifold

anchor.snippet: is the orthonormal frame bundle associated with the tangent bundle

annotations.note: Riemannian manifolds exist (`Mathlib/Geometry/Manifold/Riemannian/Basic.lean`) but their orthonormal frame bundle does not.

annotations.label: Reduction of structure group

anchor.snippet: is a reduction of the structure group

annotations.note: Structure group reduction is not formalized.

annotations.label: G-structure

anchor.snippet: we define a G -structure on

annotations.note: Grep for `G-structure` returns nothing in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Riemannian metric gives O(n)-structure

anchor.snippet: a Riemannian metric on

annotations.note: Equivalence between Riemannian metrics and O(n)-structures is not formalized.

annotations.label: Oriented frame bundle as GL+-structure

anchor.snippet: Every oriented manifold has an oriented frame bundle

annotations.note: No GL⁺-structure construction since frame bundles and G-structures are absent.

annotations.label: Volume form gives G-structure

anchor.snippet: A volume form on

annotations.note: Volume forms exist in `Mathlib/Analysis/InnerProductSpace/Orientation.lean` but no SL(n)-structure correspondence is stated.

annotations.label: Symplectic manifold G-structure

anchor.snippet: symplectic manifold has a natural

annotations.note: Mathlib has `SymplecticGroup` but no symplectic manifold or its Sp(2n)-structure.

annotations.label: Complex/almost complex manifold G-structure

anchor.snippet: complex or almost complex manifold has a natural

annotations.note: Grep for `AlmostComplex` returns nothing; no GL(n,ℂ)-structure formalized.

annotations.label: Integrability condition for symplectic G-structure

anchor.snippet: an added integrability condition is needed

annotations.note: Integrability of G-structures is not formalized.
